Document:
# Roleplay Rule 0 - Don't be an asshole Targeting or attacking someone in character based off of out of character interactions will result in admin intervention.
Holding grudges against players because of out of round information is prohibited and will result in admin intervention.
Abusing Out of Character channels to attack someone, whether directly or indirectly is prohibited and will result in admin intervention
Remember that all players are people too, & that your interactions with them mean something. Try your best to create an enjoyable experience for everyone involved.
